title: stauntonia obovatifoliola subsp. intermedia
intro: Stauntonia obovatifoliola subsp. intermedia is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Alismataceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Stauntonia obovatifoliola subsp. intermedia include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
